summary: Crisp soundboard capture of an energetic 1981 show with a fired‑up Jerry Garcia.
review: The recording is praised for its crisp, clear audio—likely a soundboard source—making the concert very listenable. Reviewers highlight Jerry Garcia’s juiced‑up playing and stage presence, describing the overall performance as great even though no specific song moments are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed positive review notes excellent sound quality and an energetic show; limited data points keep confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp and clear audio with no reported issues; overall solid mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall positive impression; Jerry Garcia’s heightened energy drives the show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as juiced up and giving everything to the audience.
